entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A condition resulting from a lack of essential micronutrients in the diet.

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: A mineral micronutrient whose deficiency contributes to malnutrition.

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: A mineral micronutrient whose deficiency contributes to malnutrition.

entities.name: VITAMIN A
entities.description: A fat-soluble vitamin essential for health, the deficiency of which causes VAD.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country in the developing world with high dependence on cereal-based diets.

entities.name: VITAMIN A DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A public health problem resulting in child deaths and increased morbidity.

entities.name: BIOFORTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of increasing the nutritional value of crops through biotechnological applications.

entities.name: GENETIC ENGINEERING
entities.description: A technique used to enhance specific traits, such as beta-carotene levels, in crop plants.

entities.name: BETA-CAROTENE
entities.description: A provitamin A carotenoid targeted for enhancement in crops.

entities.name: GOLDEN RICE
entities.description: A genetically engineered rice variety with redirected carotenoid biosynthetic pathways.

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A crop developed as a transgenic variety for enhanced provitamin A content.

entities.name: TOMATO
entities.description: A crop developed as a transgenic variety for enhanced provitamin A content.

entities.name: CASSAVA
entities.description: A crop developed as a transgenic variety for enhanced provitamin A content.

entities.name: POTATO
entities.description: A crop developed as a transgenic variety for enhanced provitamin A content.

entities.name: MUSTARD
entities.description: A crop developed as a transgenic variety for enhanced provitamin A content.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics where transgenic events were developed.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A crop developed at ICRISAT with transgenic events for increased carotenoids.

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A crop developed at ICRISAT with transgenic events for increased carotenoids.

entities.name: PSY1 GENE
entities.description: The maize phytoene synthase 1 gene used to increase carotenoid levels.

entities.name: BETA-LYCOPENE CYCLASE GENE
entities.description: The tomato beta-lycopene cyclase gene used to increase carotenoid levels.

entities.name: AGROBACTERIUM-MEDIATED GENETIC TRANSFORMATION
entities.description: A method used to introduce genes into groundnut and pigeonpea.

entities.name: TOTAL CAROTENOIDS
entities.description: The sum of carotenoids measured in transgenic crop events.

entities.name: PROVITAMIN A
entities.description: A precursor of vitamin A targeted for enrichment in crops.
